titleStmt.title: SII 26.286: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 286. (A.R. No. 271 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It describes the king as one ‘who was pleased to take Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. It records the gift of a sandhyā lamp to the temple of the same god and place occurring in No. 285 above, by a certain Pañchanadivāṇan alias Irāśarāśa Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ Dēvaṉ [••• •••]. A sum of two paḻaṅkāśu to provide for this, is stated to have been entrusted to the Śivabrāhmaṇa Kāñchikku •••• bhaṭṭaṉ Uḍaiyapiḷḷai alias Ānanda[k]kalliyāṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ, who had right of worship in the temple, and who had agreed to carry out the object of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhvuṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yā
ṇṭu 10 vatu tirukkaccūr tiruvālakkoyil ṉāyaṉāṟkku pañcanativāṉaṉāṉa Irācarāca nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ tevaṉ
ṉ vaitta cantiviḷakkoṉṟukku Ikkoyili pirāmaṇaril �ta kāṇiyuṭaiya kāñcikku bhaṭṭaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷai
yāṉanta kalliyāṇabhaṭṭaṉen Ivaṉ pakkal Iccanti viḷakkuc cantirātittavarai celuttakkaṭavom kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 2 Ippaḻaṅ
kācu Iraṇṭum kaikkoṇṭu cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kalyāṇabhaṭṭaṉ Itu paṉmāheśvara Irakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
